a\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_c31e963b-0aef-4e74-8e45-160b47ed391\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_c31e963b-0aef-4e74-8e45-160b47ed391\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/zuobowen/Documents/GitHub/fv_autovidu/reference/frontend/stitch/fv_chronicle/DESIGN.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/zuobowen/Documents/GitHub/fv_autovidu/reference/frontend/stitch/fv_chronicle/DESIGN.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/zuobowen/Documents/GitHub/fv_autovidu/reference/frontend/stitch/fv_chronicle/DESIGN.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# Design System Specification: High-End Editorial Newsprint\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 1. Overview \u0026 Creative North Star\\\\\\\\n**Creative North Star: The Kinetic Broadsheet**\\\\\\\\nThis design system moves away from the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"software-as-a-service\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aesthetic and into the realm of \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"High-End Editorial.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" For an AI Video Production Studio, the interface must feel like a precision tool wrapped in the authority of a legacy news publication. We celebrate the grid, prioritize high information density, and use stark geometry to convey a sense of cinematic permanence. \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nBy rejecting the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pill-shaped\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" trends of modern UI, we establish a signature visual identity that is unyielding, structured, and intentional. We don't just display data; we publish it.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 2. Colors \u0026 Texture\\\\\\\\nThe palette is rooted in the physical world—ink on paper, accented by a digital-first Emerald Green.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### The Palette\\\\\\\\n- **Background (&#96;surface&#96;):** &#96;#F9F9F7&#96; (The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Paper\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" stock)\\\\\\\\n- **Foreground (&#96;on-surface&#96;):** &#96;#111111&#96; (The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Ink\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" black)\\\\\\\\n- **Brand Accent (&#96;primary&#96;):** &#96;#168866&#96; (Emerald Green)\\\\\\\\n- **Warning (&#96;tertiary&#96;):** &#96;#F59E0B&#96; (Amber)\\\\\\\\n- **Structure (&#96;outline-variant&#96;):** &#96;#E5E5E0&#96; (The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fold\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" grey)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Visible Skeleton\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" Rule\\\\\\\\nUnlike traditional systems that hide structure, this system celebrates it. Section boundaries are defined by **1px solid &#96;#111111&#96; borders**. Never use soft shadows or background shifts to separate major sections. If a section needs to feel secondary, use the &#96;outline-variant&#96; (#E5E5E0) for the stroke.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Signature Textures\\\\\\\\n- **The Dot Grid:** Apply a subtle 12px x 12px dot grid to the &#96;surface&#96; background to prevent the off-white from feeling \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"flat.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n- **The Line Overlay:** For hero sections or data-heavy dashboards, use a 1px vertical line repeating every 80px to create an underlying architectural rhythm.\\\\\\\\n- **Imagery:** All video thumbnails or team photos should utilize a CSS grayscale filter (0.8 saturation) by default, returning to full color only on hover to maintain the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"printed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aesthetic.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 3. Typography: Editorial Authority\\\\\\\\nWe utilize **Manrope** but treat it with the discipline of a typographer.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Display \u0026 Headline:** Use &#96;display-lg&#96; and &#96;headline-lg&#96; for impactful statements. These should be set with tight letter-spacing (-0.02em).\\\\\\\\n- **The Serif Simulation:** To achieve \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Editorial Authority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" without adding a new font, use &#96;title-lg&#96; in all-caps with increased tracking (+0.05em) for section headers.\\\\\\\\n- **Monospace Data:** For AI processing stats, timestamps, and technical metadata, use a monospace font-family (system-default) at &#96;label-sm&#96; size.\\\\\\\\n- **Labels:** All UI labels (buttons, navigation, form titles) must be **UPPERCASE** to differentiate them from editorial body copy.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 4. Elevation \u0026 Depth: The Hard Offset\\\\\\\\nIn this system, depth is not an illusion of light—it is a physical displacement.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **The Layering Principle:** Depth is achieved by \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stacking\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" objects. When a card or button is active or hovered, it does not glow; it shifts.\\\\\\\\n- **The Hard Shadow:** Forbid soft, Gaussian blurs. Any \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"floating\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" element must use a **Hard Offset Shadow**: &#96;4px 4px 0px 0px #111111&#96;.\\\\\\\\n- **The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No-Radius\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" Rule:** Border-radius is strictly &#96;0px&#96; across all tokens. Any rounding is a violation of the system's architectural integrity.\\\\\\\\n- **The Glass Inversion:** For floating overlays (like tooltips), use a semi-transparent &#96;surface&#96; color with a &#96;backdrop-blur&#96; of 8px, but maintain the 1px solid ink border.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 5. Components\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Buttons\\\\\\\\nButtons are the primary interaction drivers and must feel heavy and mechanical.\\\\\\\\n- **Primary:** &#96;background: #111111; color: #F9F9F7; border: 1px solid #111111;&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Hover State:** &#96;background: #168866; color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #111111; transform: translate(-2px, -2px);&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Secondary:** &#96;background: transparent; color: #111111; border: 1px solid #111111;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Cards \u0026 Layout Containers\\\\\\\\nCards are defined by their borders, not their backgrounds.\\\\\\\\n- **Style:** &#96;0px&#96; radius, &#96;1px&#96; solid &#96;#111111&#96; border. \\\\\\\\n- **Padding:** Use &#96;spacing-4&#96; (0.9rem) for high density.\\\\\\\\n- **Nesting:** When nesting a card inside a section, the inner card should use a &#96;1px&#96; stroke of &#96;#E5E5E0&#96; to maintain hierarchy without visual clutter.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Inputs \u0026 Forms\\\\\\\\n- **Field Style:** &#96;0px&#96; radius, &#96;1px&#96; solid &#96;#111111&#96;. \\\\\\\\n- **Focus State:** Background shifts to &#96;surface-container-lowest&#96; (#FFFFFF) with a &#96;primary&#96; (#168866) 1px border.\\\\\\\\n- **Labels:** &#96;label-md&#96; in Uppercase, placed directly above the field with 0 margin, sharing a border-line with the input box.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Data Chips\\\\\\\\n- **Selection Chips:** Square corners. When selected, the chip inverts (Black background, Off-white text). Use &#96;label-sm&#96; for the text.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 6. Do's and Don'ts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Do\\\\\\\\n- **Celebrate the Grid:** Align text to the 1px border lines. Let the structure show.\\\\\\\\n- **Embrace Density:** Use tight padding (&#96;spacing-2&#96; to &#96;spacing-4&#96;). AI workflows require seeing a lot of data at once.\\\\\\\\n- **Use Intentional Asymmetry:** If a layout feels too \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"balanced,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" shift a column by one grid unit to create an editorial, magazine-style feel.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Don't\\\\\\\\n- **No Softness:** Never use &#96;border-radius&#96; or &#96;box-shadow&#96; blurs. It weakens the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Studio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" authority.\\\\\\\\n- **No Flat Minimalism:** Avoid large areas of empty white space without a grid texture or a divider line; it makes the UI look \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unfinished\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" rather than \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"minimal.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n- **No 100% Opaque Colors for Accents:** Use the &#96;primary&#96; green sparingly. It is a highlighter, not a bucket-fill.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Accessibility Note\\\\\\\\nWhile maintaining high density, ensure that all &#96;on-surface&#96; text on &#96;surface&#96; backgrounds maintains a contrast ratio of at least 7:1. The &#96;outline-variant&#96; (#E5E5E0) should only be used for decorative structural lines, never for essential text.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":88}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"2b8243aa-5550-455a-9dad-13e68249b287\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"3991af4a-8097-4a06-bd04-baf7cb8571c0\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-20T07:33:06.452Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\ Design System Specification: High-End Editorial Newsprint\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 1. Overview \u0026 Creative North Star\\\\\\\\n**Creative North Star: The Kinetic Broadsheet**\\\\\\\\nThis design system moves away from the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"software-as-a-service\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aesthetic and into the realm of \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"High-End Editorial.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" For an AI Video Production Studio, the interface must feel like a precision tool wrapped in the authority of a legacy news publication. We celebrate the grid, prioritize high information density, and use stark geometry to convey a sense of cinematic permanence. \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nBy rejecting the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pill-shaped\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" trends of modern UI, we establish a signature visual identity that is unyielding, structured, and intentional. We don't just display data; we publish it.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 2. Colors \u0026 Texture\\\\\\\\nThe palette is rooted in the physical world—ink on paper, accented by a digital-first Emerald Green.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### The Palette\\\\\\\\n- **Background (&#96;surface&#96;):** &#96;#F9F9F7&#96; (The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Paper\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" stock)\\\\\\\\n- **Foreground (&#96;on-surface&#96;):** &#96;#111111&#96; (The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Ink\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" black)\\\\\\\\n- **Brand Accent (&#96;primary&#96;):** &#96;#168866&#96; (Emerald Green)\\\\\\\\n- **Warning (&#96;tertiary&#96;):** &#96;#F59E0B&#96; (Amber)\\\\\\\\n- **Structure (&#96;outline-variant&#96;):** &#96;#E5E5E0&#96; (The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fold\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" grey)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Visible Skeleton\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" Rule\\\\\\\\nUnlike traditional systems that hide structure, this system celebrates it. Section boundaries are defined by **1px solid &#96;#111111&#96; borders**. Never use soft shadows or background shifts to separate major sections. If a section needs to feel secondary, use the &#96;outline-variant&#96; (#E5E5E0) for the stroke.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Signature Textures\\\\\\\\n- **The Dot Grid:** Apply a subtle 12px x 12px dot grid to the &#96;surface&#96; background to prevent the off-white from feeling \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"flat.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n- **The Line Overlay:** For hero sections or data-heavy dashboards, use a 1px vertical line repeating every 80px to create an underlying architectural rhythm.\\\\\\\\n- **Imagery:** All video thumbnails or team photos should utilize a CSS grayscale filter (0.8 saturation) by default, returning to full color only on hover to maintain the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"printed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" aesthetic.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 3. Typography: Editorial Authority\\\\\\\\nWe utilize **Manrope** but treat it with the discipline of a typographer.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Display \u0026 Headline:** Use &#96;display-lg&#96; and &#96;headline-lg&#96; for impactful statements. These should be set with tight letter-spacing (-0.02em).\\\\\\\\n- **The Serif Simulation:** To achieve \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Editorial Authority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" without adding a new font, use &#96;title-lg&#96; in all-caps with increased tracking (+0.05em) for section headers.\\\\\\\\n- **Monospace Data:** For AI processing stats, timestamps, and technical metadata, use a monospace font-family (system-default) at &#96;label-sm&#96; size.\\\\\\\\n- **Labels:** All UI labels (buttons, navigation, form titles) must be **UPPERCASE** to differentiate them from editorial body copy.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 4. Elevation \u0026 Depth: The Hard Offset\\\\\\\\nIn this system, depth is not an illusion of light—it is a physical displacement.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **The Layering Principle:** Depth is achieved by \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stacking\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" objects. When a card or button is active or hovered, it does not glow; it shifts.\\\\\\\\n- **The Hard Shadow:** Forbid soft, Gaussian blurs. Any \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"floating\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" element must use a **Hard Offset Shadow**: &#96;4px 4px 0px 0px #111111&#96;.\\\\\\\\n- **The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No-Radius\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" Rule:** Border-radius is strictly &#96;0px&#96; across all tokens. Any rounding is a violation of the system's architectural integrity.\\\\\\\\n- **The Glass Inversion:** For floating overlays (like tooltips), use a semi-transparent &#96;surface&#96; color with a &#96;backdrop-blur&#96; of 8px, but maintain the 1px solid ink border.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 5. Components\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Buttons\\\\\\\\nButtons are the primary interaction drivers and must feel heavy and mechanical.\\\\\\\\n- **Primary:** &#96;background: #111111; color: #F9F9F7; border: 1px solid #111111;&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Hover State:** &#96;background: #168866; color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #111111; transform: translate(-2px, -2px);&#96;\\\\\\\\n- **Secondary:** &#96;background: transparent; color: #111111; border: 1px solid #111111;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Cards \u0026 Layout Containers\\\\\\\\nCards are defined by their borders, not their backgrounds.\\\\\\\\n- **Style:** &#96;0px&#96; radius, &#96;1px&#96; solid &#96;#111111&#96; border. \\\\\\\\n- **Padding:** Use &#96;spacing-4&#96; (0.9rem) for high density.\\\\\\\\n- **Nesting:** When nesting a card inside a section, the inner card should use a &#96;1px&#96; stroke of &#96;#E5E5E0&#96; to maintain hierarchy without visual clutter.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Inputs \u0026 Forms\\\\\\\\n- **Field Style:** &#96;0px&#96; radius, &#96;1px&#96; solid &#96;#111111&#96;. \\\\\\\\n- **Focus State:** Background shifts to &#96;surface-container-lowest&#96; (#FFFFFF) with a &#96;primary&#96; (#168866) 1px border.\\\\\\\\n- **Labels:** &#96;label-md&#96; in Uppercase, placed directly above the field with 0 margin, sharing a border-line with the input box.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Data Chips\\\\\\\\n- **Selection Chips:** Square corners. When selected, the chip inverts (Black background, Off-white text). Use &#96;label-sm&#96; for the text.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 6. Do's and Don'ts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Do\\\\\\\\n- **Celebrate the Grid:** Align text to the 1px border lines. Let the structure show.\\\\\\\\n- **Embrace Density:** Use tight padding (&#96;spacing-2&#96; to &#96;spacing-4&#96;). AI workflows require seeing a lot of data at once.\\\\\\\\n- **Use Intentional Asymmetry:** If a layout feels too \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"balanced,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" shift a column by one grid unit to create an editorial, magazine-style feel.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Don't\\\\\\\\n- **No Softness:** Never use &#96;border-radius&#96; or &#96;box-shadow&#96; blurs. It weakens the \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Studio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" authority.\\\\\\\\n- **No Flat Minimalism:** Avoid large areas of empty white space without a grid texture or a divider line; it makes the UI look \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unfinished\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" rather than \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"minimal.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n- **No 100% Opaque Colors for Accents:** Use the &#96;primary&#96; green sparingly. It is a highlighter, not a bucket-fill.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Accessibility Note\\\\\\\\nWhile maintaining high density, ensure that all &#96;on-surface&#96; text on &#96;surface&#96; backgrounds maintains a contrast ratio of at least 7:1. The &#96;outline-variant&#96; (#E5E5E0) should only be used for decorative structural lines, never for essential text.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":88}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"7c7fa41d-949a-4743-8d3e-702fab94047a\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"88244f2f-5838-4bac-9eef-fbd550df0b3e\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-20T07:33:06.452Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\ [],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"702e02b5-59fb-4ce4-ac41-e19ebc65108c\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-20T07:33:06.452Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\\nHere is the summary of &#96;/Users/zuobowen/Documents/GitHub/fv_autovidu/reference/frontend/stitch&#96;:\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# Summary: FV Studio Stitch Reference Frontend\\\\n\\\\n## 1. File Structure\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nreference/frontend/stitch/\\\\n├── episode_list_newsprint/\\\\n│   └── code.html\\\\n├── fv_chronicle/\\\\n│   └── DESIGN.md\\\\n├── regen_newsprint_style/\\\\n│   └── code.html\\\\n├── shot_details_newsprint/\\\\n│   └── code.html\\\\n├── storyboard_overview_newsprint/\\\\n│   └── code.html\\\\n└── timeline_newsprint/\\\\n    └── code.html\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- **6 files** total\\\\n- **5 UI pages** as static HTML\\\\n- **1 design spec** (&#96;DESIGN.md&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Tech Stack\\\\n\\\\n| Technology | Usage |\\\\n|------------|--------|\\\\n| **HTML5** | Structure |\\\\n| **Tailwind CSS** | Utility-first CSS via CDN (&#96;cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries&#96;) |\\\\n| **Google Fonts** | Manrope, Inter, JetBrains Mono |\\\\n| **Material Symbols Outlined** | Icons |\\\\n| **Vanilla HTML/CSS** | No JS framework, React, Vue, etc. |\\\\n\\\\n**Not present:**\\\\n- &#96;package.json&#96;, npm/yarn\\\\n- JS framework (React/Vue/Svelte)\\\\n- Build tools (Vite/Webpack)\\\\n- Routing\\\\n- State management\\\\n- Real API calls\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Design System (fv_chronicle/DESIGN.md)\\\\n\\\\nDesign spec for an editorial/newsprint look:\\\\n\\\\n- **Primary color:** &#96;#168866&#96; (Emerald Green)\\\\n- **Surface:** &#96;#F9F9F7&#96; (paper)\\\\n- **On-surface:** &#96;#111111&#96; (ink)\\\\n- **Typography:** Manrope (headlines), Inter (body), JetBrains Mono (metadata)\\\\n- **Style:** No border-radius, hard offset shadows (&#96;4px 4px 0px 0px #111111&#96;), grayscale images by default, dot/line grids\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. Components (Inline in HTML)\\\\n\\\\nAll are inlined; no separate component files:\\\\n\\\\n| Component | Location | Description |\\\\n|-----------|-----------|-------------|\\\\n| **SideNavBar** | All pages | Fixed left sidebar: logo, nav (Episode List, Settings), status (API, tasks) |\\\\n| **TopNavBar** | All pages | Breadcrumb, search, Projects/Assets, notifications, user avatar |\\\\n| **Video Player** | timeline_newsprint | Player, progress bar, controls |\\\\n| **Timeline** | timeline_newsprint | Multi-track editor (V1, A1, A2) with clips, transitions, playhead |\\\\n| **Episode Cards** | episode_list_newsprint | Bento-style cards with progress and status |\\\\n| **Shot Cards** | storyboard_overview_newsprint | Shot thumbnails with metadata and actions |\\\\n| **Candidate Comparison** | shot_details_newsprint | Side-by-side candidate videos with metadata |\\\\n| **Regen Modal** | regen_newsprint_style | Modal: original asset, generation prompt, reference catalog, candidate proofs |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. Pages/Routes\\\\n\\\\nNo routing; each page is a standalone HTML file:\\\\n\\\\n| File | Page | Purpose |\\\\n|------|------|---------|\\\\n| &#96;episode_list_newsprint/code.html&#96; | Episode List | Episode management, bento cards, pipeline status |\\\\n| &#96;timeline_newsprint/code.html&#96; | Timeline | Video timeline (clips, audio, playhead) |\\\\n| &#96;storyboard_overview_newsprint/code.html&#96; | Storyboard Overview | Scenes and shots by scene |\\\\n| &#96;shot_details_newsprint/code.html&#96; | Shot Details | Shot parameters and candidate comparison |\\\\n| &#96;regen_newsprint_style/code.html&#96; | Regenerate Frame | Modal for regenerating shot frames with prompt and references |\\\\n\\\\nNavigation is simulated via &#96;\u003ca href=\\\\\\\"#\\\\\\\"\u003e&#96;; there are no real routes.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. API / Integrations\\\\n\\\\nNo real API integration:\\\\n\\\\n- All references are UI status text only:\\\\n  - &#96;API: ONLINE&#96;\\\\n  - &#96;API Connected&#96;\\\\n  - &#96;API_LIVE&#96;\\\\n  - &#96;Automated API Refresh Sequence&#96;\\\\n- No &#96;fetch&#96;, &#96;axios&#96;, or other HTTP calls\\\\n- No defined endpoints or service clients\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. Configuration\\\\n\\\\n### Tailwind Config (inline)\\\\n\\\\nEach file has its own inline &#96;tailwind.config&#96; object. Common settings:\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\\\\n{\\\\n  darkMode: \\\\\\\"class\\\\\\\",\\\\n  theme: {\\\\n    extend: {\\\\n      colors: { primary: \\\\\\\"#168866\\\\\\\", surface: \\\\\\\"#F9F9F7\\\\\\\", ... },\\\\n      fontFamily: { headline: [\\\\\\\"Manrope\\\\\\\"], body: [\\\\\\\"Inter\\\\\\\"], mono: [\\\\\\\"JetBrains Mono\\\\\\\"] },\\\\n      borderRadius: { DEFAULT: \\\\\\\"0px\\\\\\\", lg: \\\\\\\"0px\\\\\\\", xl: \\\\\\\"0px\\\\\\\", full: \\\\\\\"0px\\\\\\\" }\\\\n    }\\\\n  }\\\\n}\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### CDN\\\\n\\\\n- Tailwind: &#96;https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries&#96;\\\\n- Google Fonts + Material Symbols for fonts and icons\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 8. State Management\\\\n\\\\nNone. Pages are static HTML with:\\\\n\\\\n- No JavaScript framework\\\\n- No client-side state\\\\n- No reactivity or two-way binding\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 9. Styling\\\\n\\\\n- **Utility-first CSS:** Tailwind utility classes\\\\n- **Inline styles:** Some &#96;style&#96; attributes (e.g. &#96;font-variation-settings&#96;)\\\\n- **Custom CSS in &#96;\u003cstyle\u003e&#96;:** &#96;.newsprint-bg&#96;, &#96;.grayscale-clip&#96;, &#96;.hard-shadow&#96;, &#96;.halftone&#96;, &#96;.waveform-path&#96;, etc.\\\\n- **Textures:** Dot grid, radial gradients, newsprint backgrounds via CSS\\\\n- **Images:** &#96;grayscale&#96; and &#96;grayscale-clip&#96; for editorial look\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 10. Features (UI-only)\\\\n\\\\n| Feature | Implementation |\\\\n|---------|----------------|\\\\n| Episode list | Episode cards with progress bars, stats footer |\\\\n| Timeline editor | Video/A1/A2 tracks, clips, transitions, playhead |\\\\n| Storyboard | Scenes and shots with status badges |\\\\n| Shot details | Start/end frames, prompts, candidate comparison |\\\\n| Regenerate frame | Modal with prompt, reference catalog, candidate proofs |\\\\n| Search | Search input in header (non-functional) |\\\\n| Notifications | Icon (non-functional) |\\\\n| Video playback | Player UI and controls (non-functional) |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Summary\\\\n\\\\n&#96;stitch&#96; is a static reference/mockup frontend for an AI video production studio. It uses:\\\\n\\\\n- Static HTML + Tailwind + custom CSS\\\\n- Editorial “newsprint” design (fv_chronicle)\\\\n- No framework, routing, state management, or backend integration\\\\n- Five main UI flows: Episode List, Timeline, Storyboard, Shot Details, Regenerate Frame\\\\n\\\\nIt functions as design and layout reference rather than a working application.\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1773903520350,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}}],\"name\":\"Explore sequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-20T07:33:06.453Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_97e8bba3-3e54-45bd-aed9-d5012721622\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_97e8bba3-3e54-45bd-aed9-d5012721622\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/zuobowen/Documents/GitHub/fv_autovidu/docs/平台辅助计划/前端生成prompt.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/zuobowen/Documents/GitHub/fv_autovidu/docs/平台辅助计划/前端生成prompt.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"/Users/zuobowen/Documents/GitHub/fv_autovidu/docs/平台辅助计划/前端生成prompt.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# 前端生成 Prompt\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003e 直接复制下方内容，粘贴到 AI 代码生成工具中使用。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Prompt\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n帮我创建一个 AI 视频制作工作站的前端项目。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 技术栈\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- React 19 + TypeScript\\\\\\\\n- Vite\\\\\\\\n- Tailwind CSS 4\\\\\\\\n- React Router v7（文件路由）\\\\\\\\n- Zustand（状态管理）\\\\\\\\n- Lucide React（图标）\\\\\\\\n- Framer Motion（动画）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 设计规范\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 主题色配色\\\\\\\\n- 主色：#168866（翡翠绿）\\\\\\\\n- 主色浅：#1da87e（hover 态）\\\\\\\\n- 主色深：#0f6b50（active 态）\\\\\\\\n- 主色极浅：#e6f5ef（背景色/Tag背景）\\\\\\\\n- 强调色：#f59e0b（警告/待处理状态，琥珀色）\\\\\\\\n- 错误色：#ef4444\\\\\\\\n- 成功色：#168866（复用主色）\\\\\\\\n- 背景色：#f8fafb（全局页面底）\\\\\\\\n- 卡片背景：#ffffff\\\\\\\\n- 文字主色：#1a1a2e\\\\\\\\n- 文字次要：#6b7280\\\\\\\\n- 边框色：#e5e7eb\\\\\\\\n- 分割线：#f0f0f0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 设计风格\\\\\\\\n- 现代简洁的 Dashboard 风格，类似 Linear / Notion\\\\\\\\n- 圆角统一 8px（卡片 12px）\\\\\\\\n- 阴影使用 &#96;shadow-sm&#96;，hover 时 &#96;shadow-md&#96;\\\\\\\\n- 间距系统：4px 基准，常用 8/12/16/24/32\\\\\\\\n- 字体：系统字体栈，中文优先 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"PingFang SC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Microsoft YaHei\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n- 所有交互有 hover/active 状态，transition 200ms\\\\\\\\n- 空状态都要有插画/图标 + 文字引导\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 项目定位\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n这是一个 **AI 视频分镜制作本地工作站**。用户在云端平台完成剧本分析、资产管理、分镜板出图后，数据被拉取到本地。本前端连接本地 Python FastAPI 后台（http://localhost:8000），完成后续的视频制作工作：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 查看已拉取的分镜数据（首帧图 + prompt + 资产）\\\\\\\\n2. 批量生成尾帧图（首帧 + prompt + 资产 → AI 生成）\\\\\\\\n3. 批量生成视频（首帧/首尾帧 → Vidu AI 生成 5s 视频）\\\\\\\\n4. 单帧带资产重新生成（对不满意的首帧，修改 prompt + 选择资产 → 重新生成）\\\\\\\\n5. 多候选视频对比选择\\\\\\\\n6. 视频粗剪拼接导出\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 数据结构\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n后台数据基于一个核心 JSON 文件 &#96;episode.json&#96;，结构如下：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript\\\\\\\\ninterface Episode {\\\\\\\\n  projectId: string;\\\\\\\\n  episodeId: string;\\\\\\\\n  episodeTitle: string;        // \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"第2集\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  episodeNumber: number;\\\\\\\\n  pulledAt: string;            // ISO 时间\\\\\\\\n  scenes: Scene[];\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface Scene {\\\\\\\\n  sceneId: string;\\\\\\\\n  sceneNumber: number;\\\\\\\\n  title: string;               // \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"废弃仓库外\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  shots: Shot[];\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface Shot {\\\\\\\\n  shotId: string;\\\\\\\\n  shotNumber: number;          // 全局编号，1-based\\\\\\\\n  imagePrompt: string;         // 画面描述 prompt\\\\\\\\n  videoPrompt: string;         // 视频动作 prompt\\\\\\\\n  duration: number;            // 视频时长秒数\\\\\\\\n  cameraMovement: string;      // push_in / pull_out / pan_left 等\\\\\\\\n  aspectRatio: string;         // \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"9:16\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"16:9\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  firstFrame: string;          // 本地路径 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"frames/S01.png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  assets: ShotAsset[];         // 关联的资产\\\\\\\\n  status: ShotStatus;\\\\\\\\n  endFrame: string | null;     // 本地路径 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"endframes/S01_end.png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  videoCandidates: VideoCandidate[];\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ntype ShotStatus = \\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"         // 刚拉取，未开始\\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"endframe_generating\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  // 尾帧生成中\\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"endframe_done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"   // 尾帧已生成\\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"video_generating\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" // 视频生成中\\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"video_done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"      // 视频已生成（有候选）\\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"selected\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"        // 已选定最终视频\\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"error\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";          // 出错\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface ShotAsset {\\\\\\\\n  assetId: string;\\\\\\\\n  name: string;                // \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"达里尔\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  type: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"character\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"location\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"prop\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"other\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n  localPath: string;           // \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assets/达里尔.png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  prompt: string;              // 资产描述文本\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ninterface VideoCandidate {\\\\\\\\n  id: string;\\\\\\\\n  videoPath: string;           // \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"videos/S01/v1.mp4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  thumbnailPath: string;       // \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"videos/S01/v1_thumb.jpg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  seed: number;\\\\\\\\n  model: string;               // \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"viduq2-pro-fast\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  mode: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"first_frame\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"first_last_frame\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reference\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n  selected: boolean;\\\\\\\\n  createdAt: string;\\\\\\\\n  taskId: string;              // Vidu 任务 ID\\\\\\\\n  taskStatus: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"processing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\";\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 后台 API 接口\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n前端连接 &#96;http://localhost:8000&#96;，以下是需要对接的接口：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Episode 管理\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nGET    /api/episodes                    → Episode[]      # 列出所有本地 episode\\\\\\\\nGET    /api/episodes/:episodeId         → Episode        # 获取单个 episode 完整数据\\\\\\\\nPOST   /api/episodes/pull               → Episode        # 触发从平台拉取\\\\\\\\n       Body: { episodeId: string }\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Shot 操作\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nGET    /api/episodes/:episodeId/shots               → Shot[]    # 获取 shot 列表\\\\\\\\nGET    /api/episodes/:episodeId/shots/:shotId       → Shot      # 获取单个 shot\\\\\\\\nPATCH  /api/episodes/:episodeId/shots/:shotId       → Shot      # 更新 shot（改 prompt 等）\\\\\\\\n       Body: Partial\u003cShot\u003e\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 生成操作\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nPOST   /api/generate/endframe           → { taskId, shotId }\\\\\\\\n       Body: { episodeId, shotIds: string[] }     # 批量生成尾帧\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nPOST   /api/generate/video              → { tasks: [{taskId, shotId}] }\\\\\\\\n       Body: { \\\\\\\\n         episodeId, \\\\\\\\n         shotIds: string[],\\\\\\\\n         mode: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"first_frame\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"first_last_frame\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reference\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n         model?: string,\\\\\\\\n         duration?: number \\\\\\\\n       }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nPOST   /api/generate/regen-frame        → { taskId, shotId, newFramePath }\\\\\\\\n       Body: { \\\\\\\\n         episodeId, \\\\\\\\n         shotId: string,\\\\\\\\n         imagePrompt: string,          # 修改后的 prompt\\\\\\\\n         assetIds: string[]            # 选中的资产 ID\\\\\\\\n       }\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 任务状态\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nGET    /api/tasks/:taskId               → TaskStatus\\\\\\\\nGET    /api/tasks/batch?ids=a,b,c       → TaskStatus[]   # 批量查询\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 选择 \u0026 导出\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nPOST   /api/shots/:shotId/select        → Shot\\\\\\\\n       Body: { candidateId: string }   # 选定某个候选视频\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nPOST   /api/export/rough-cut            → { exportPath }\\\\\\\\n       Body: { episodeId, shotIds?: string[] }  # 按顺序拼接导出\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 静态文件\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nGET    /api/files/:path*                → 文件内容       # 访问本地图片/视频文件\\\\\\\\n       例: /api/files/frames/S01.png\\\\\\\\n       例: /api/files/videos/S01/v1.mp4\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 页面结构\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 布局\\\\\\\\n- 左侧固定侧边栏（240px宽，可折叠到 64px）\\\\\\\\n  - 顶部：Logo + 项目名 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"FV Studio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  - 导航项：Episode 列表（带数量 badge）、设置\\\\\\\\n  - 底部：系统状态指示（后台连接状态、正在运行的任务数）\\\\\\\\n- 右侧主内容区，顶部有面包屑导航\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 页面 1：Episode 列表页（/）\\\\\\\\n- 卡片网格展示所有已拉取的 Episode\\\\\\\\n- 每张卡片显示：\\\\\\\\n  - Episode 标题 + 编号\\\\\\\\n  - Shot 总数\\\\\\\\n  - 进度条（pending / endframe_done / video_done / selected 各阶段占比）\\\\\\\\n  - 拉取时间\\\\\\\\n  - 点击进入详情\\\\\\\\n- 右上角按钮：「从平台拉取新 Episode」（弹出 dialog 输入 episodeId）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 页面 2：分镜板总览（/episode/:id）⭐ 核心页面\\\\\\\\n- 顶部信息栏：Episode 标题、Shot 总数、各状态统计\\\\\\\\n- 顶部操作栏：\\\\\\\\n  - 筛选：按状态筛选 Shot（全部 / 待处理 / 尾帧完成 / 视频完成 / 已选定）\\\\\\\\n  - 批量操作按钮组：\\\\\\\\n    - 「批量生成尾帧」（对所有 pending 的 shot）\\\\\\\\n    - 「批量生成视频」（对所有 endframe_done 的 shot）\\\\\\\\n    - 「导出粗剪」\\\\\\\\n  - 视图切换：网格视图 / 列表视图\\\\\\\\n- 按 Scene 分组展示，每个 Scene 是一个可折叠区块，标题显示场景名\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### Shot 卡片（网格视图，每行 3-5 个自适应）\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n┌─────────────────────────┐\\\\\\\\n│ S01  ▪ push_in  ▪ 5s    │  ← Shot 编号 + 运镜 + 时长\\\\\\\\n├─────────────────────────┤\\\\\\\\n│                         │\\\\\\\\n│   [首帧图 缩略图]        │  ← 点击可放大预览\\\\\\\\n│                         │\\\\\\\\n├─────────────────────────┤\\\\\\\\n│ 尾帧: [缩略图] / ⏳生成中 │  ← 尾帧状态\\\\\\\\n├─────────────────────────┤\\\\\\\\n│ 视频: ▶ v1  ▶ v2  ✓v3  │  ← 视频候选列表，✓ 表示选中\\\\\\\\n├─────────────────────────┤\\\\\\\\n│ 资产: 👤达里尔 🏠废弃仓库  │  ← 关联资产 tag\\\\\\\\n├─────────────────────────┤\\\\\\\\n│ [重生] [生成尾帧] [出视频] │  ← 操作按钮\\\\\\\\n└─────────────────────────┘\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- 卡片左上角有状态色标：\\\\\\\\n  - pending = 灰色\\\\\\\\n  - endframe_generating / video_generating = 主色 + 脉冲动画\\\\\\\\n  - endframe_done = 主色浅\\\\\\\\n  - video_done = 琥珀色（待选择）\\\\\\\\n  - selected = 主色 + 勾号\\\\\\\\n  - error = 红色\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### Shot 行（列表视图）\\\\\\\\n- 表格形式：编号 | 首帧缩略 | 尾帧缩略 | 状态 | prompt 摘要 | 资产 | 视频候选数 | 操作\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 页面 3：Shot 详情 / 视频对比（/episode/:id/shot/:shotId）\\\\\\\\n- 左侧面板（40%宽）：\\\\\\\\n  - 首帧大图 + 尾帧大图（上下排列或左右并排切换）\\\\\\\\n  - Image Prompt 文本（可展开全文）\\\\\\\\n  - Video Prompt 文本（可展开全文）\\\\\\\\n  - 关联资产列表（带缩略图）\\\\\\\\n  - 镜头信息：运镜类型、时长、画幅比\\\\\\\\n- 右侧面板（60%宽）：\\\\\\\\n  - 视频候选列表，每个候选是一张卡片：\\\\\\\\n    - 视频播放器（内嵌）\\\\\\\\n    - 下方显示：模型名 / seed / 生成模式 / 生成时间\\\\\\\\n    - 「选定」按钮（选中后高亮主色边框）\\\\\\\\n  - 底部操作：\\\\\\\\n    - 「生成新视频」按钮（弹出配置面板：选择模式/模型/时长）\\\\\\\\n    - 「重新生成尾帧」按钮\\\\\\\\n- 上方切换到前/后 Shot 的导航箭头\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 页面 4：单帧重生（/episode/:id/shot/:shotId/regen）\\\\\\\\n- 或作为 Shot 详情页的 Modal/Drawer\\\\\\\\n- 布局：\\\\\\\\n  - 左列：当前首帧大图\\\\\\\\n  - 中列：\\\\\\\\n    - Image Prompt 文本编辑器（textarea，可修改）\\\\\\\\n    - 资产选择：复选框列表，显示该 Episode 所有资产，带缩略图，可勾选/取消\\\\\\\\n    - 「生成新首帧」主按钮（#168866）\\\\\\\\n  - 右列：生成的候选首帧图（可能有多个）\\\\\\\\n    - 每个候选下方有「采用此图」按钮\\\\\\\\n    - 采用后弹出确认：\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"采用新首帧后，该 Shot 的尾帧和视频将被清除，需要重新生成。确认？\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 页面 5：粗剪时间线（/episode/:id/timeline）\\\\\\\\n- 顶部预览播放器（拼接后的完整视频预览）\\\\\\\\n- 下方时间线：\\\\\\\\n  - 按 Scene 分组的横向时间轴\\\\\\\\n  - 每个 Shot 是时间线上的一个色块，宽度按 duration 比例\\\\\\\\n  - 色块内显示 Shot 编号 + 缩略图\\\\\\\\n  - 可拖拽调整顺序\\\\\\\\n  - 未选定视频的 Shot 显示为灰色虚线框\\\\\\\\n- 底部操作：\\\\\\\\n  - 「导出 MP4」按钮\\\\\\\\n  - 导出配置：分辨率选择、是否加转场\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 页面 6：设置（/settings）\\\\\\\\n- 后台连接配置（API 地址，默认 http://localhost:8000）\\\\\\\\n- 默认视频生成参数：模型、时长、分辨率\\\\\\\\n- 尾帧生成参数：yunwu 模型、图片尺寸\\\\\\\\n- 数据目录路径显示\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 组件规范\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 通用组件\\\\\\\\n- Button：主要按钮（#168866 背景白字）、次要按钮（白底#168866描边）、危险按钮（红色）、Ghost 按钮\\\\\\\\n- Badge：状态 badge，圆角全圆，5 种颜色对应 5 种状态\\\\\\\\n- Card：白底卡片，&#96;rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Dialog/Modal：居中弹出，遮罩层 &#96;bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm&#96;\\\\\\\\n- Toast：右上角通知，成功/错误/信息三种\\\\\\\\n- Tooltip：鼠标悬停提示\\\\\\\\n- Progress：线性进度条，带百分比文字\\\\\\\\n- Skeleton：加载骨架屏\\\\\\\\n- Empty State：空状态插画 + 引导文字 + CTA 按钮\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 业务组件\\\\\\\\n- ShotCard：Shot 卡片（分镜板用）\\\\\\\\n- ShotRow：Shot 行（列表视图用）\\\\\\\\n- VideoPlayer：视频播放器（支持 .mp4，带播放/暂停/进度条/全屏）\\\\\\\\n- ImagePreview：图片预览（点击放大 lightbox，支持首帧/尾帧/资产图）\\\\\\\\n- PromptEditor：Prompt 编辑 textarea，带字数统计\\\\\\\\n- AssetTag：资产标签（带图标区分 character/location/prop + 名字）\\\\\\\\n- AssetSelector：资产多选列表（带缩略图 + 复选框）\\\\\\\\n- StatusIndicator：状态指示灯（小圆点 + 脉冲动画）\\\\\\\\n- SceneGroup：Scene 折叠分组容器\\\\\\\\n- TimelineTrack：时间线轨道\\\\\\\\n- TimelineClip：时间线片段（可拖拽）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 其他要求\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 所有页面支持响应式，最小宽度 1024px，最大自适应\\\\\\\\n2. 图片/视频通过后台 &#96;/api/files/&#96; 代理访问本地文件，不要使用 file:// 协议\\\\\\\\n3. 长列表使用虚拟滚动（50+ Shot 时）\\\\\\\\n4. 视频播放器要轻量，不要引入重依赖，用 HTML5 \u003cvideo\u003e 标签即可\\\\\\\\n5. 支持键盘快捷键：\\\\\\\\n   - 分镜板页：← → 切换 Shot，Enter 进入详情，Space 播放视频\\\\\\\\n   - Shot 详情页：1-9 数字键快速选定候选，← → 切换 Shot\\\\\\\\n6. 所有异步操作要有 loading 状态和错误处理\\\\\\\\n7. 生成类操作（尾帧/视频）提交后，前端轮询任务状态（每 3 秒），状态更新后自动刷新对应 Shot 卡片\\\\\\\\n8. 项目名叫 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"FV Studio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"，侧边栏 Logo 用文字 logo 即可\\\\\\\\n9. 中文界面\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 补充说明\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n以上 Prompt 可以直接粘贴到 Cursor / v0 / Bolt 等 AI 工具中生成前端代码。生成后需要：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 配置 &#96;vite.config.ts&#96; 的 proxy，将 &#96;/api&#96; 代理到 &#96;http://localhost:8000&#96;\\\\\\\\n2. 后台的静态文件服务（&#96;/api/files/&#96;）需要挂载本地 &#96;data/&#96; 目录\\\\\\\\n3. 如果后台还没开发，可以先用 mock &#96;docs/平台辅助计划&#96; 下 2 个文件的完整内容和整理后的分析总结如下。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# 平台辅助计划 - 完整分析\\\\n\\\\n## 一、文件概览\\\\n\\\\n| 文件 | 行数 | 主要用途 |\\\\n|------|------|----------|\\\\n| &#96;平台辅助计划.md&#96; | 431 | 整体架构、流程、API、开发计划、风险等 |\\\\n| &#96;前端生成prompt.md&#96; | 312 | 给 AI 的前端项目生成 Prompt，含技术栈与界面规范 |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# 二、文件 1：&#96;平台辅助计划.md&#96; 全文（逐段标注）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\\\\n（第1-45行：标题、一句话总结、Mermaid 总流程图 - 平台拉取 → 本地视频制作）\\\\n（第47-96行：需拉取的数据清单、平台 API 列表、episode.json 格式）\\\\n（第98-172行：本地目录结构、工作流程、各环节说明）\\\\n（第274-430行：需开发的代码、改造的脚本、前端结构、.env 配置、开发计划、与现有脚本关系、风险、参考 API）\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# 三、文件 2：&#96;前端生成prompt.md&#96; 全文\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\\\\n（第1-10行：用途说明 - 可直接粘贴到 AI 代码生成工具）\\\\n（第12-306行：Prompt 主体 - 技术栈、设计规范、项目定位、数据结构、后台 API、页面结构、组件规范、其他要求）\\\\n（第308-312行：补充说明 - vite proxy、静态文件服务、mock 数据）\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# 四、功能与计划\\\\n\\\\n## 4.1 从平台拉取\\\\n\\\\n- 登录获取 Token\\\\n- 拉取分镜 Shot 列表和场景列表\\\\n- 下载所有首帧图、资产图\\\\n- 生成本地 &#96;episode.json&#96; 元数据\\\\n\\\\n## 4.2 本地视频制作\\\\n\\\\n- **尾帧生成**：首帧 + image/video prompt + 资产 → yunwu/Gemini 生成尾帧\\\\n- **首帧 i2v**：首帧 + videoPrompt → Vidu img2video\\\\n- **首尾帧 i2v**：首帧 + 尾帧 + videoPrompt → Vidu img2video（2 帧输入）\\\\n- **单帧带资产重生**：不满意首帧 → 改 prompt + 选资产 → 重新出图\\\\n- **多候选对比选择**：同 Shot 多版本并排对比、打分、标记 selected\\\\n- **视频拼接粗剪**：按 Scene 顺序串联 → FFmpeg 拼接 → 输出\\\\n- **可选**：结果回传平台\\\\n\\\\n## 4.3 前端能力（来自前端 Prompt）\\\\n\\\\n| 页面 | 功能 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| Episode 列表页 | 卡片网格、进度、拉取新 Episode |\\\\n| 分镜板总览 | 网格/列表、Scene 分组、批量尾帧/视频、筛选 |\\\\n| Shot 详情 | 首尾帧、prompt、资产、多候选、播放、选定 |\\\\n| 单帧重生 | 修改 prompt、选资产、生成新首帧、级联更新 |\\\\n| 粗剪时间线 | 预览、拖拽排序、导出 MP4 |\\\\n| 设置 | API 地址、默认参数、数据目录 |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# 五、提及的 API\\\\n\\\\n## 5.1 平台 API（Feeling Video，只读）\\\\n\\\\n| 用途 | 方法 | 路径 | 说明 |\\\\n|------|------|------|------|\\\\n| 登录 | POST | &#96;/api/auth/login&#96; | Body: &#96;{ phone, password }&#96; → &#96;{ accessToken }&#96; |\\\\n| 分镜 Shot 列表 | GET | &#96;/api/storyboard/episodes/{episodeId}/shots&#96; | 核心，含首帧 URL、prompt、资产 |\\\\n| 场景列表 | GET | &#96;/api/storyboard/episodes/{episodeId}/scenes&#96; | Scene 分组 |\\\\n| 资产列表 | GET | &#96;/api/assets/episode/{episodeId}&#96; | 资产 id、name、type、prompt、imageUrl |\\\\n| 刷新 COS URL | GET | &#96;/api/cos/refresh-url?filePath=xxx&#96; | 备用 |\\\\n| 直接下载 | GET | &#96;/api/cos/download?filePath=xxx&#96; | 备用 |\\\\n| Swagger | - | https://dev-video-server.feeling.ltd/api-docs | 文档地址 |\\\\n\\\\n## 5.2 本地后台 API（FastAPI）\\\\n\\\\n| 用途 | 方法 | 路径 |\\\\n|------|------|------|\\\\n| Episode 管理 | GET | &#96;/api/episodes&#96; |\\\\n| Episode 详情 | GET | &#96;/api/episodes/:episodeId&#96; |\\\\n| 触发平台拉取 | POST | &#96;/api/episodes/pull&#96; (Body: &#96;{ episodeId }&#96;) |\\\\n| Shot 列表 | GET | &#96;/api/episodes/:episodeId/shots&#96; |\\\\n| Shot 详情 | GET | &#96;/api/episodes/:episodeId/shots/:shotId&#96; |\\\\n| 更新 Shot | PATCH | &#96;/api/episodes/:episodeId/shots/:shotId&#96; |\\\\n| 批量生成尾帧 | POST | &#96;/api/generate/endframe&#96; |\\\\n| 批量生成视频 | POST | &#96;/api/generate/video&#96; |\\\\n| 单帧重生 | POST | &#96;/api/generate/regen-frame&#96; |\\\\n| 任务状态 | GET | &#96;/api/tasks/:taskId&#96; |\\\\n| 批量任务状态 | GET | &#96;/api/tasks/batch?ids=a,b,c&#96; |\\\\n| 选定候选 | POST | &#96;/api/shots/:shotId/select&#96; |\\\\n| 粗剪导出 | POST | &#96;/api/export/rough-cut&#96; |\\\\n| 静态文件 | GET | &#96;/api/files/:path*&#96; |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# 六、架构与流程\\\\n\\\\n## 6.1 总体流程（Mermaid 简版）\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n① 平台拉取 → 登录 → 拉 Shot/Scene/Asset → 下载首帧和资产 → 写 episode.json\\\\n② 本地制作 → 尾帧生成 → i2v（首帧/首尾帧/ref2v）→ 前端预览/选择/对比 → 拼接导出\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n## 6.2 本地目录结构\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\ndata/{projectId}/{episodeId}/\\\\n├── episode.json       # 核心索引\\\\n├── frames/            # 首帧 S01.png, S02.png...\\\\n├── assets/            # 资产图\\\\n├── endframes/         # 尾帧 S01_end.png...\\\\n├── videos/S{nn}/     # 视频候选 v1.mp4, v2.mp4, selected.mp4\\\\n└── export/            # 粗剪输出 episode_rough.mp4\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n## 6.3 模块划分\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;src/feeling/&#96;**：平台拉取（&#96;client.py&#96;、&#96;puller.py&#96;）\\\\n- **改造脚本**：&#96;gen_tail.py&#96;、&#96;batch.py&#96; 增加 &#96;--from-json&#96; / &#96;--with-endframe&#96;\\\\n- **新增脚本**：&#96;scripts/regen/regen_frame.py&#96; 单帧重生\\\\n- **&#96;web/&#96;**：FastAPI 后台 + React 前端\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# 七、具体需求与规格\\\\n\\\\n## 7.1 技术栈（前端）\\\\n\\\\n- React 19 + TypeScript + Vite\\\\n- Tailwind CSS 4、React Router v7（文件路由）、Zustand、Lucide React、Framer Motion\\\\n\\\\n## 7.2 设计规范（前端）\\\\n\\\\n- 主色 &#96;#168866&#96;、强调色 &#96;#f59e0b&#96;\\\\n- 8px/12px 圆角、shadow-sm/hover shadow-md\\\\n- 最小宽度 1024px，响应式\\\\n\\\\n## 7.3 &#96;episode.json&#96; 核心 schema\\\\n\\\\n- Episode：&#96;projectId&#96;, &#96;episodeId&#96;, &#96;episodeTitle&#96;, &#96;episodeNumber&#96;, &#96;pulledAt&#96;, &#96;scenes[]&#96;\\\\n- Scene：&#96;sceneId&#96;, &#96;sceneNumber&#96;, &#96;title&#96;, &#96;shots[]&#96;\\\\n- Shot：&#96;shotId&#96;, &#96;shotNumber&#96;, &#96;imagePrompt&#96;, &#96;videoPrompt&#96;, &#96;duration&#96;, &#96;cameraMovement&#96;, &#96;aspectRatio&#96;, &#96;firstFrame&#96;, &#96;assets[]&#96;, &#96;status&#96;, &#96;endFrame&#96;, &#96;videoCandidates[]&#96;\\\\n- ShotStatus：&#96;pending&#96; | &#96;endframe_generating&#96; | &#96;endframe_done&#96; | &#96;video_generating&#96; | &#96;video_done&#96; | &#96;selected&#96; | &#96;error&#96;\\\\n- VideoCandidate：&#96;id&#96;, &#96;videoPath&#96;, &#96;seed&#96;, &#96;model&#96;, &#96;mode&#96;, &#96;selected&#96;, &#96;taskId&#96;, &#96;taskStatus&#96;\\\\n\\\\n## 7.4 开发计划（粗略）\\\\n\\\\n- Phase 1：平台拉取（约 0.5 天）\\\\n- Phase 2：改造脚本（约 1 天）\\\\n- Phase 3：本地前端（约 3–5 天）\\\\n\\\\n## 7.5 环境变量\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;env\\\\nFEELING_API_BASE=https://dev-video-server.feeling.ltd/api\\\\nFEELING_PHONE=...\\\\nFEELING_PASSWORD=...\\\\nVIDU_API_KEY=...\\\\nYUNWU_API_KEY=...\\\\nDATA_ROOT=./data\\\\nWEB_PORT=8080\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n## 7.6 风险与对策\\\\n\\\\n| 风险 | 对策 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| Shot 结构不确定 | 先跑真实接口，再定 episode.json 格式 |\\\\n| COS URL 过期 | 拉取时直接下载到本地 |\\\\n| 首帧分辨率不一 | 记录到 metadata，生成时按需缩放 |\\\\n| Vidu 大批量 | 本地令牌桶限速 |\\\\n| 重生后需级联更新 | 前端触发后清除尾帧和视频，标记待重生 |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# 八、已弃用脚本\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;crop_grid.py&#96;\\\\n- &#96;extract_assets.py&#96;\\\\n- &#96;extract_prompts.py&#96;\\\\n- &#96;parse_raw_to_prompt.py&#96;\\\\n\\\\n这些由平台与 &#96;puller&#96; 应用中暴露哪些功能），我可以帮你设计工具定义和实现方式。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":98,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**Explaining WebMCP**\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":100,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"I'm clarifying that WebMCP enables AI agents to interact with web pages by invoking structured tools like &#96;book_flight&#96; or &#96;submit_application&#96;. I'm clarifying how WebMCP enables AI agents to understand and invoke structured tools on web pages, replacing traditional screen-scraping with robust interaction. \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":102,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**Clarifying webmcp purpose**\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":104,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"I'm correcting the user's misunderstanding that WebMCP enables end-to-end web testing, clarifying it's for exposing structured APIs/tools to AI agents. I'm clarifying that WebMCP enables AI agents to discover available tools on a site, not end-to-end testing. \u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":111,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"## WebMCP 不是 E2E 测试工具\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":113,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**WebMCP** 的用途是：\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":126,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| **Playwright** | 常用 E2E 框架，支持 Chromium / Firefox / WebKit，适合 CI/CD |\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":219,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| **WebMCP 能用来做 E2E 测试吗？** | 不能。WebMCP 是用来给 AI agent 暴露工具的，不是测试框架。 |\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":259,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **WebMCP** 不能直接用来做 E2E 测试。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":269,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"那这个webmcp主要是干嘛用的呢？是给用户的吗？\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":276,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"## WebMCP 是做什么的？\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":278,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**WebMCP** 主要是给**网站开发者**用的，让他们能把网页能力以「工具」形式暴露给**浏览器里的 AI agent**。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":301,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"    B --\u003e|用 WebMCP 暴露工具| C\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":308,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **网站开发者**：用 WebMCP 在网站上注册、描述工具，让 AI 知道怎么正确操作。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":309,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"- **AI Agent**：是真正「调用」这些 WebMCP 工具的一方。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":313,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"## 为什么要有 WebMCP？\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":315,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| 没有 WebMCP | 有 WebMCP |\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":325,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| 对象 | 是否需要了解 WebMCP |\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":328,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| **网站开发者** | 需要，要用 WebMCP API 在自家网站注册工具 |\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":335,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**WebMCP 是给网站开发者用的标准，用来把网页能力暴露给浏览器里的 AI agent，让 AI 能稳定、准确地按你的设计去操作你的网站。** 普通用户只享受到「AI 更好用」的结果，不需要知道或使用 WebMCP 本身。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":350,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"## WebMCP = 协议 + 标准化接口\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":362,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| **WebMCP** | 在网页上声明「工具名 + 参数 + 描述」，让 Agent 按协议调用 |\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":381,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"**WebMCP 是一套协议，用来把网站能力标准化，让 Agent 把网站当成 API/CLI 来用。** 网站还是给人看的 UI，但 Agent 多了结构化的调用方式，不再只能靠“看图猜操作”。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":396,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"I'm assessing whether WebMCP protocol could enable low-token e2e testing instead of screenshot-based Playwright. I'm exploring WebMCP as a token-efficient alternative to screenshot-based Playwright testing. I'm evaluating WebMCP as a token-efficient alternative to screenshot-based Playwright testing, focusing on structured data exchange instead of images. I'm exploring WebMCP as a token-efficient alternative to Playwright screenshots for e2e testing. \u003c/details\u003e\u003c/think\u003e\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":408,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| **WebMCP / 结构化工具** | 拿到工具列表和 schema → 直接传 JSON 参数调用 → 拿到 JSON 结果 | **低**（纯文本） |\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":418,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"WebMCP / 工具调用：\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":437,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"    subgraph WebMCP 风格 E2E\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":443,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"如果你的页面用 WebMCP 暴露了工具：\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":453,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. **需要浏览器**：WebMCP 的工具是在浏览器里注册的，测试还是要在真实标签页里跑，不是完全 headless。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":454,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"2. **工具要先写好**：你的页面必须用 WebMCP 注册好工具，E2E 才能“按协议”调用。\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":464,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"把 WebMCP 用在 E2E 上，相当于**把「看图猜操作」换成「按协议调工具」**，可以显著降低 token 消耗。更适合作为逻辑/流程类测试的主方案，视觉类测试仍可保留 Playwright 做补充。\\\\\\\"}]},{\\\\\\\"file\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"./docs/WebMCP Early Preview.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"matches\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":5,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| WebMCP Early Preview | **Authors** | [Alexandra Klepper](mailto:grammar@google.com) [Andre Bandarra](mailto:andreban@google.com) [Carlos Giraldo](mailto:cgiraldo@google.com) [François Beaufort](mailto:fbeaufort@google.com) |\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":11,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"WebMCP is a proposed web standard that exposes structured tools for AI agents on existing websites. This would replace \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"screen-scraping\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" with robust, high-performance page interaction and knowledge retrieval. WebMCP provides JavaScript and annotates HTML form elements so that agentic browsers know exactly how to interact with page features to support a user's experience.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":13,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"By exposing APIs to the browser agent, WebMCP significantly improves the performance and reliability of AI agent actuation.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":15,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"The following are some examples of how WebMCP could be applied to your website: \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":17,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* Example Airline's website exposes a &#96;book_flight&#96; tool. Agents use this tool to submit structured passenger data directly, rather than guessing how data should be input, based on Example Airline's calendar UI which is designed for human users.  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":23,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"WebMCP bridges the gap between web applications and AI agents by providing a contract for interaction. Rather than the agent guessing the purpose of a button or the structure of a form, the website can explicitly publish its interface. This contract defines:\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":31,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"Our goal for the WebMCP early preview is to understand the following topics:\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":33,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* **Use cases**: Identify when you think you'd use WebMCP and how it supports a given task.  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":34,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* **API shape and usability**: Feedback on the ergonomics of the WebMCP APIs. Are there functions you expect to find in the APIs that don't yet exist?  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":42,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"WebMCP is available behind a flag  in Chrome 146\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\. Learn more about [Chrome flags](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/web-platform/chrome-flags).\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":46,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"To use WebMCP, you need:\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":49,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* **Flags**: The \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"WebMCP for testing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" flag must be enabled.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":53,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. Open Chrome and navigate to &#96;chrome://flags/#enable-webmcp-testing&#96;  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":61,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"[Install the Model Context Tool Inspector Extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/model-context-tool-inspec/gbpdfapgefenggkahomfgkhfehlcenpd) to see how WebMCP works in the [live demo](#live-demo). The extension lets you inspect registered functions, execute them manually or test them with an agent.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":82,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* Users can enter natural language prompts to see if the agent can correctly identify and invoke the appropriate WebMCP tools.  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":90,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"Explore the WebMCP capabilities with our hosted travel demo:  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":91,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"[https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/)\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":95,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. With the Model Context Tool Inspector Extension installed, navigate to [https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/).  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":103,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. With the Model Context Tool Inspector Extension installed, navigate to [https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/) and then open the extension.  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":127,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"1. With the Model Context Tool Inspector Extension installed, navigate to [https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/). Then, open the extension.  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":144,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* [Travel Demo (React) | WebMCP Imperative Demo](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/react-flightsearch/)  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":145,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* [Le Petit Bistro | WebMCP Declarative Demo](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/french-bistro/)  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":146,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* [WebMCP zaMaker\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\! | WebMCP Imperative Demo](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/pizza-maker/)\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":148,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"You can also review and explore the demo source code on [GitHub](https://github.com/GoogleChromeLabs/webmcp-tools/tree/main/demos).\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":191,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"Use the Declarative API to automatically transform standard HTML forms into WebMCP tools by adding specific annotations. These annotations define the tool's name and purpose through the &#96;toolname&#96; and &#96;tooldescription&#96; HTML attributes on the &#96;\u003cform\u003e&#96; element, while the form fields act as the parameters for the tool. The browser then translates these elements into a structured representation that an AI agent can interpret and use, similar to how imperative tools are handled.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":261,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"The &#96;SubmitEvent&#96; interface introduces a new &#96;agentInvoked&#96; boolean attribute. This attribute is set to true whenever a form is triggered by an AI agent, to adapt your web app's behavior specifically for agent-based interactions.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":266,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\u003cform toolautosubmit \\\\\\\\u000b      toolname=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"search_tool\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\u000b      tooldescription=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Search the web\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" action=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/search\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\u003e\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":369,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* **Browsing context required**: Since tool calls are handled in JavaScript, a browsing context (i.e. a browser tab or a webview) must be opened. There is no support for agents or assistive tools to call tools \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"headlessly,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" meaning without visible browser UI.  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":370,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* **UI synchronization**: For a satisfactory end user experience, web developers must ensure their UI is updated to reflect the current app state, regardless of whether the state updates came from human interaction or from a tool call.  \\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":381,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### What is the difference between MCP and WebMCP?\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":385,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"[WebMCP](https://github.com/webmachinelearning/webmcp/blob/main/README.md) is a protocol inspired by MCP that allows developers to provide tools to in-browser AI agents. WebMCP helps developers implement client-side functions or use a declarative API in their existing web application, so agents are better equipped to interact with the application.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":387,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"### Can I use WebMCP in other browsers?\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":389,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"WebMCP is a [proposed web standard](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Learn_web_development/Getting_started/Web_standards/The_web_standards_model#web_standards). Our goal is to build APIs that any browser with agentic capabilities can implement and benefit from. The early preview is only in Chrome.\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":391,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"You can follow along this process on [GitHub](https://github.com/webmachinelearning/webmcp).\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":397,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"| Mar 12, 2026 | Removed &#96;toolparamtitle&#96; attribute Added [demo](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/pizza-maker/) 项目结构\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nfv_autovidu/\\\\\\\\n├── config/                    # 配置\\\\\\\\n│   └── default.yaml           # 默认配置（模型、时长等）\\\\\\\\n├── scripts/                   # README.md\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 网格布局规则\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n根据 prompt 中的场景数量自动推断 grid 行列：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 场景数 | 布局 (行×列) | 说明 |\\\\\\\\n|--------|--------------|------|\\\\\\\\n| 3 | 1×3 | 横向或纵向 3 格 |\\\\\\\\n| 4 | 2×2 | 标准四宫格 |\\\\\\\\n| 5 | 2×3 | 2 行 3 列，用前 5 格 |\\\\\\\\n| 6 | 2×3 或 3×2 | 六宫格 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 使用流程\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **配置**：复制 &#96;.env.example&#96; 为 &#96;.env&#96;，填入 Vidu API Key\\\\\\\\n2. **裁剪**：&#96;python scripts/crop_grid.py&#96; 将分镜包内的 grid 裁成单格\\\\\\\\n3. **生成**：&#96;python scripts/i2v_batch.py&#96; 批量提交 i2v 任务\\\\\\\\n4. **或一键**：&#96;./scripts/run.sh&#96; Now I have a thorough understanding of everything. Let me write the gap analysis and plan as a markdown file. Let me carefully compare:

**Stitch reference (what we have):**
- 5 static HTML pages: Episode List, Timeline, Storyboard Overview, Shot Details, Regen Frame
- Newsprint editorial design (no border-radius, hard shadows, grayscale, dot grids)
- Tailwind CSS via CDN with inline config
- No framework (pure HTML)
- No routing, state management, API integration
- No JavaScript at all

**平台辅助计划 requirements (what we need):**


- React 19 with TypeScript and Vite as the build tool
- Tailwind CSS 4, React Router v7 for file-based routing, Zustand for state management, Lucide React for icons, and Framer Motion for animations
- Modern dashboard aesthetic similar to Linear or Notion with 8-12px rounded corners
- Six pages total including a new Settings page
- Complete backend integration with FastAPI, task polling, batch operations, video playback, image previews, prompt editing, keyboard shortcuts, and virtual scrolling for performance

The main challenge is reconciling the original newsprint design (sharp corners, hard shadows, grayscale) with the modern dashboard direction (rounded corners, soft shadows, color). Beyond that, I need to build out the full component architecture, implement real data loading with proper error and loading states, set up the API layer, and ensure the layout is responsive across devices. The typography also needs attention—moving from system fonts to a cohesive font stack with Manrope, Inter, and JetBrains Mono.

I should also localize the entire UI to Chinese and add the missing Settings page, plus implement features like task polling, batch operations, keyboard shortcuts, and virtual scrolling for performance.</details></think>

计划文档已写入 `docs/平台辅助计划/前端改造计划.md`。下面是核心总结：

## Stitch 参考前端差距分析

### 可复用的（布局参考）
- **5 个页面布局**直接对应计划中的 5/6 个页面（缺设置页）
- **侧边栏 / 顶栏 / Shot 卡片 / 时间线**的 HTML 结构和 Tailwind 类名
- **配色方案**完全一致：翡翠绿 `#168866` 主色 + 琥珀色 `#f59e0b` 强调色

### 完全缺失的（需全部新建）

| 缺失维度 | 详情 |
|---------|------|
| **框架** | 纯静态 HTML → 需重构为 React 19 + TypeScript + Vite |
| **路由** | 无 → React Router v7（6 条路由） |
| **状态管理** | 无 → Zustand（4 个 Store） |
| **API 对接** | 无 → 全部 14 个 FastAPI 接口 |
| **交互逻辑** | 无 → 任务轮询、批量操作、键盘快捷键、拖拽排序 |
| **通用组件** | 无 → Button/Card/Badge/Dialog/Toast 等 9 个 |
| **设计风格** | 报纸风（方角/硬阴影/灰度） → 需切换为现代 Dashboard 风（圆角/柔阴影/彩色） |
| **设置页** | 完全没有 → 需新建 |

### 开发计划：5-7 天，5 个 Sprint

1. **Day 1**：项目脚手架 + 通用组件 + 布局迁移
2. **Day 2-3**：Episode 列表 + 分镜板总览（核心）+ Shot 详情
3. **Day 4**：任务轮询 + 批量操作 + 单帧重生
4. **Day 5**：粗剪时间线 + 设置页 + 快捷键
5. **Day 6-7**：虚拟滚动 + 动画 + 响应式 + 测试打磨

**核心策略**：Stitch 作为**布局蓝图**参考，样式以计划书的**现代 Dashboard 风**为准，前端可通过 Mock 数据与后台**并行开发**。
